args.code: (() => { const input = document.querySelector('input[value="/"]'); if (!input) { const inputs = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input')); for (const i of inputs) { if (i.value === '/') { i.focus(); i.select(); i.value = 'backend'; i.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', {bubbles: true})); i.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', {bubbles: true})); return 'set to backend'; } } return 'no / input found'; } input.focus(); input.select(); input.value = 'backend'; input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', {bubbles: true})); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', {bubbles: true})); return 'set to backend'; })()
